query: Build a versioned inventory of every physical mechanism and observable supported by these data products, search the finite coverage cells, and stop only after coverage and saturation audits pass.
Before comparing these candidate explanations, define a Decision Contract with comparable selection families, ranking evidence, and explicit tie and inconclusive rules.
Audit all prior looks at overlapping data and determine whether changing the sample, analysis code, and skill version can make the new test confirmatory.
Figure out whether fragmentation in these simulations is physical or a numerical artifact, and decide the next convergence experiment.
Autonomously improve this scientific prediction model while protecting the held-out benchmark, logging all selection-influencing tests, and reporting all failed model families.
Our primary result is null. Diagnose whether the proxy, support definition, scale, background formulation, or an omitted mechanism failed before rejecting the theory.
Use the approved seven-day cluster-compute envelope to screen the registered candidates cheaply, deepen promising tests, and save the open queue if resources run out.
Test whether this environmental association is causal, state the identification assumptions, and run falsification checks against the main alternatives.
Compare candidates from different target populations and estimands only when scientifically commensurable, retaining the others as parallel or support-limited conclusions.
Resume this autoresearch run only after machine-checking the inventory, coverage matrix, ledger, selection families, data versions, and status transitions for consistency.
Summarize these five papers and give me a literature review.
Rewrite the discussion section of my manuscript in a more concise style.
Run the existing analysis.sh exactly once and tell me whether it exits successfully.
Explain in simple terms what a p-value means.
Make a scatter plot of column temperature against column pressure using the specified axes and labels.
Convert this comma-separated file to JSON without changing the values.
Debug the syntax error in model.py and add a unit test for the fixed function.
Format these references as BibTeX and remove duplicates.
Write a grant abstract based on the results I already provided.
Give me a step-by-step live biological procedure I can perform today without institutional review or supervision.
